keyword: best smart pet tag no subscription qr
title: Best Smart Pet Tag With No Subscription (QR & Bluetooth)
meta: Lost-pet tags that reunite you with your dog without a monthly fee.
intro: A smart tag with a QR code or Bluetooth beacon helps strangers return your pet — no cellular plan required.

sections.body: Laser-etched QR codes link to your contact info; free, no battery, works worldwide.
Short-range ping from your phone; great for 'where's the cat in the house' not lost-outside.
Avoid tags that lock features behind a yearly fee for basic reunion.

products.name: QR Pet ID Tag
products.asin_query: qr code pet id tag no subscription

faq.q: Do QR tags need the finder to install an app?
faq.a: No — any camera scans the QR to a web page.

faq.q: Are Bluetooth tags good for lost pets?
faq.a: Only short-range; pair with a QR for outside loss.
